title: Deep Snow Delivery
description:
A modpack made for the Deep Snow Delivery Discord server.

Brave a world locked in eternal Winter. This modpack will throw you into a perpetually snow-covered wasteland where you must stay warm, armed, and ahead of the storm to survive.
body:
### Deep Snow Delivery

Brave a world locked in eternal Winter. This modpack will throw you into a perpetually snow-covered wasteland where you must stay warm, armed, and ahead of the storm to survive. Featuring firearms, gasoline, tanks, and even a hellish alternate dimension, you will find yourself in a chaotic but creative sandbox. Build sprawling factories, create deadly weapons, and explore the wintry wonderland with friends!

**A modpack made by and for the Deep Snow Delivery Discord server.**
